basic_details.job_title: NMPA Senior Deputy Chief Accounts Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Candidates must be a Member of the Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) or Institute of Cost Accountants of India (ICMAI/ICWAI) with a minimum of twelve years of experience in the executive cadre in Finance/Accounting within an Industrial, Commercial, or Government Undertaking, within the prescribed maximum age limit of 42 years, with applicable relaxations as per government norms.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 42 years Age relaxation is applicable for PwBD / Ex-servicemen as per GoI guidelines; up to 55 years for employees of Major Port Authorities of India.

qualification.details: Member of Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) OR Member of Institute of Cost Accountants of India (ICMAI / ICWAI) Twelve years' experience in executive cadre in the field of Finance / Accounting in an Industrial / Commercial / Government Undertaking

selection_process: Shortlisting based on qualification & experience Document Verification Interview
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NMPA to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NMPA Senior Deputy Chief Accounts Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the NMPA Senior Deputy Chief Accounts Officer position is 15th May 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be a Member of the Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) or the Institute of Cost Accountants of India (ICMAI/ICWAI) and possess twelve years of experience in finance or accounting in an executive cadre.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Senior Deputy Chief Accounts Officer post is 42 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, according to the provided information, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Senior Deputy Chief Accounts Officer position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 80,000 to Rs. 2,20,000.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Deputy Chief Accounts Officer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the post of Senior Deputy Chief Accounts Officer in the New Mangalore Port Authority.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their qualification and experience, followed by document verification and an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application mode for this NMPA recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is online. Candidates need to apply through the official website of NMPA.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the New Mangalore Port Authority located?
faq.answer: The New Mangalore Port Authority is located in Mangalore, Karnataka.

faq.question: Q10. What is the crucial date for determining eligibility?
faq.answer: The crucial date for determining eligibility for this recruitment is 1st April 2026.
